overall.description: A cinematic shot from a video game depicting the interior of a grand gothic great hall at night, illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Two robed figures stand in the foreground observing rows of dining tables filled with people, while large stained glass windows reveal a dark blue night sky outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic great hall with floating candlelight and dining tables

events.description: the robed figure on the right briefly raises their arm in a gesturing motion toward the hall

agents.ego_description: standing at the entrance of the great hall behind two robed figures, observing the dining area

notable_agents.action: standing still in dark robes facing the dining hall
standing in dark robes and briefly raising their right arm to gesture toward the tables

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles floating magically in the air beneath the vaulted ceiling
rows of long wooden tables set with dining ware and occupied by seated figures
tall gothic arched windows revealing a dark blue night sky outside
large stone fireplace with warm fire glowing on the left wall of the hall
high arched stone ceiling with wooden beams and magical floating candles

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady view of a magnificent gothic great hall illuminated by hundreds of floating candles. Two robed figures stand in the foreground observing the scene, with one briefly gesturing toward the rows of dining tables filled with people. The hall features a high vaulted ceiling, a large stone fireplace on the left, and tall stained glass windows on the right showing the night sky outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze across a magnificent gothic great hall illuminated by the soft glow of hundreds of floating candles. It begins with a wide view of the vaulted ceiling and a large stone fireplace, framing two robed figures in the foreground who observe the vast space. As the camera lingers, one of the figures briefly gestures toward the long rows of dining tables filled with people. The scene then draws attention toward the right side of the hall, where tall stained glass windows reveal the deep blue of the night sky outside.
